message:
🐛 Fix compliance dashboard showing demo data in live mode (#2482)

Gate mock/demo compliance stats behind explicit demo mode check
(useDemoMode hook) instead of showing fake data whenever compliance
tools are absent. When connected to a live cluster without Kyverno,
Kubescape, or Trivy, stats now show zeros instead of fabricated
numbers (78% compliance, 136 passing, 20 failing). Also disables
clicks on demo tiles to prevent users from opening live drill-down
modals that would show contradictory real data (0 issues).

Fixes #2407

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
